name: @mchatai/mcp-server-fundamentals
description: MCP server that exposes the mChatAI Fundamentals catalog (dictionaries, palettes, emoji, etc.) so Claude Code / Codex / other MCP-aware CLIs can enumerate platform-level content primitives via list_fundamentals without out-of-band knowledge.
